title: Text output flickers a lot when using podman pull
body:

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue

Nice download bars like docker

comments.body: I'm unable to reproduce this - what specific image are you pulling, and what terminal are you using?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closing due to no response. Please re-open if you can provide a reproducer.
